controls.control_objective: To ensure be reckoned as part of net worth
controls.control_description:
A UCB shall have minimum net worth as under:
Explanation -
Note -
(1) Funds raised through Perpetual Debt Instruments (PDIs) included in Tier 1 capital
and debt capital instruments included in Tier 2 capital shall not be reckoned as part
of net worth.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reckoned as part of net worth

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reckoned as part of net worth
controls.control_description:
(2) Perpetual Cumulative Preference Shares (PCPS), Redeemable Non-Cumulative
Preference Shares (RNCPS) and Redeemable Cumulative Preference Shares
(RCPS) included in Tier 2 capital shall not be reckoned as part of net worth.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reckoned as part of net worth

controls.control_description: (3) No general or specific provisions shall be included in computation of net worth.

controls.control_objective: To ensure commence or carry on banking business unless the aggregate value of its paid-up capital and reserves is not less than one lakh of rupees
controls.control_description:
In terms of the provisions contained in section 11 read with section 56 of the BR
Act, 1949, no co-operative bank shall commence or carry on banking business
unless the aggregate value of its paid-up capital and reserves is not less than
one lakh of rupees.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to commence or carry on banking business unless the aggregate value of its paid-up capital and reserves is not less than one lakh of rupees

controls.control_description:

controls.control_objective: To ensure have minimum net worth of ₹5 crore
controls.control_description: (ii) All other UCBs (of all tiers) shall have minimum net worth of ₹5 crore;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have minimum net worth of ₹5 crore

controls.control_objective: To ensure achieve the minimum net worth of ₹2 crore or ₹5 crore (as applicable) in a phased manner
controls.control_description:
(iii) A UCB which currently does not meet the minimum net worth requirement
as above, shall achieve the minimum net worth of ₹2 crore or ₹5 crore (as
applicable) in a phased manner.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to achieve the minimum net worth of ₹2 crore or ₹5 crore (as applicable) in a phased manner

cent of the applicable minimum net worth on or before March 31, 2026 and

controls.control_description: $$ PNCPS issued in excess of the overall ceiling of 35 per cent (PNCPS and PDI not exceeding 35 per cent of Tier 1 Capital at any point of time), shall be eligible for inclusion under Upper Tier 2 Capital, subject to limits prescribed for Tier 2 Capital.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be eligible for inclusion under upper tier 2 capital

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed 100 per cent of tier 1 capital at any point of time
controls.control_description: The outstanding amount of these instruments along with other components of Tier 2 Capital shall not exceed 100 per cent of Tier 1 Capital at any point of time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exceed 100 per cent of tier 1 capital at any point of time

controls.control_objective: To ensure be limited to 50 per cent of total tier 1 capital
controls.control_description: $$$$ The amount of LTSB eligible to be reckoned as Tier 2 Capital shall be limited to 50 per cent of total Tier 1 Capital.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be limited to 50 per cent of total tier 1 capital

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be covered in the aforementioned ceiling of 50 per cent and reckoned for capital purposes
controls.control_description: The outstanding LTDs shall also be covered in the aforementioned ceiling of 50 per cent and reckoned for capital purposes.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be covered in the aforementioned ceiling of 50 per cent and reckoned for capital purposes

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed 100 per cent of tier 1 capital
controls.control_description: These instruments, together with other components of Tier 2 Capital shall not exceed 100 per cent of Tier 1 Capital.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exceed 100 per cent of tier 1 capital

controls.control_objective: To ensure be based on the amount of tier 1 capital after deduction of goodwill and other intangible assets, but before the deduction of equity investments in subsidiaries
controls.control_description: The aforementioned limit shall be based on the amount of Tier 1 Capital after deduction of goodwill and other intangible assets, but before the deduction of equity investments in subsidiaries, if any.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be based on the amount of tier 1 capital after deduction of goodwill and other intangible assets, but before the deduction of equity investments in subsidiaries
